title: Rich and Meaty Vietnamese Sausages Pho
description: A hearty Vietnamese-inspired dish featuring Italian fennel sausages, confit tomatoes, and a rich beef broth. Suitable for meal prep and diabetic diets.

ingredients.name: Italian Fennel Sausages
ingredients.notes: such as sweet or hot Italian sausage

instructions: In a large pot, combine beef broth, fish sauce, soy sauce, brown sugar, rice vinegar, ground ginger, and garlic. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes.
In a separate pan, brown the Italian fennel sausages over medium-high heat, about 5 minutes per side. Remove from heat and set aside.
In the same pan, add confit tomatoes and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
To assemble the Pho, place cooked rice noodles in a bowl, add sliced scallions, bean sprouts, and green onions. Place the browned sausages on top of the noodles.
Pour the hot beef broth mixture over the sausages and noodles, and serve immediately.
